metadata.thoughts:
**Extracting train strike information**

I need to output JSON based on the provided content about guaranteed train services during a strike in Sardinia. The document specifies that from October 8, 2025, to December 13, 2025, certain train lines will be guaranteed on weekdays during specified time slots. It seems this document is clarifying procedures in case of a rail transport strike rather than announcing an upcoming strike. I'll ensure to format this information correctly in JSON!
